creator: cjpm@gmx.es
text:
- Add GH_PROJECT target to make it fetchable again.

--- Makefile.orig       2015-08-17 22:51:32.802906000 +0200
+++ Makefile    2015-08-17 22:50:46.759023000 +0200
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@
 
 USE_GITHUB=    yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=    pgollucci
+GH_PROJECT=    freebsd-bugzilla-cli
 
 NO_ARCH=       yes
 NO_BUILD=      yes
